autoFixesApplied: N+1 query eliminated in listPermissionGroups (2 batch queries replace 2N queries)
Multi-tenant isolation hardened in getUser (organisationId now in DB WHERE clause)
In-memory role/status filtering replaced with DB WHERE clauses in listUsers
In-memory scalar filtering replaced with DB WHERE clauses in listExecutions
In-memory scalar filtering replaced with DB WHERE clauses in exportExecutions
In-memory scalar filtering replaced with DB WHERE clauses in listTasks
In-memory status filtering replaced with DB WHERE clause in listOrganisations
Full table scan replaced with targeted query in createOrganisation name/slug conflict check
React.lazy() code splitting implemented for all 16 page components in App.tsx
Suspense boundary added for lazy-loaded routes
Email failure logging added to userService invite (was silent catch)
Email failure logging added to organisationService org creation (was silent catch)
Manager permission group WHERE clause uses inArray instead of chained eq (correct semantics)
inArray imported in drizzle-orm for permissionGroupService, executionService, taskService
manualActionsRequired: Add rate limiting middleware to /api/auth/login and /api/auth/invite/accept (express-rate-limit not in package.json)
Move JWT token from localStorage to httpOnly cookie to prevent XSS theft
Add Zod schema validation to route handlers instead of manual string checks
Add CSRF protection for state-changing operations
Add file type whitelist validation on file upload endpoint
Implement password strength requirements (uppercase, number, special char)
Add audit logging for sensitive operations (user deletion, role changes)
Add semantic HTML elements to Layout component (nav, main, aside)
Add aria-label and aria-current attributes to navigation
Add README.md with setup instructions, architecture overview, deployment guide
